# AMI Architecture — Deployment Structure and Multi-Environment Configuration

## When to Activate

Activate when:
- Designing, scaffolding, or auditing a 3forge deployment
- Managing multi-environment configurations (DEV/QA/UAT/PROD)
- Promoting changes between environments
- Configuring property files, schema files, or datasources
